judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After fetching the AccountId "#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX" for the contact, the agent only queried the Order table for June dates and, upon getting an empty result (without handling the leading "#" corruption or checking OrderItem/Product2 for the "AI processing unit"), prematurely returned "no purchase," missing the required product Id retrieval.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent only queried the Order table for the contact's account in June using the raw AccountId and, upon getting no rows, prematurely concluded there was no purchase instead of identifying the contact’s last-month transaction and extracting the Product2 Id for the "AI processing unit."
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent fetched the contact’s AccountId as "#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX" and then filtered Order records using this unnormalized value, so due to the leading "#" corruption the June 2021 Order/OrderItem queries returned empty results and it incorrectly concluded no purchase existed.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After getting the contact’s AccountId, the agent queried an Opportunity (without any date filtering for “last month”) and pulled all its OpportunityLineItem Product2Ids, then arbitrarily returned the first one instead of identifying the “AI processing unit” from the relevant past transaction in the specified timeframe, as shown in the trace steps fetching Opportunity Id 006Wt000007BInBIAW and its two Product2Ids before returning 01tWt000006hUgwIAE.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly identifying the June 2021 opportunities and fetching their OpportunityLineItem Product2Ids (including both '#01tWt000006hV8LIAU' and '01tWt000006hV8LIAU'), the agent queried Product2 using an IN list that mistakenly omitted the uncorrupted '01tWt000006hV8LIAU' and included the corrupted '#01tWt000006hV8LIAU', then returned the only matching product ('01tWt000006hTUkIAM') instead of the AI processing unit.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
